completeness.notes: Free API only. Pro API (pro-api.llama.fi/{key}/...) intentionally skipped — adds ~50 endpoints we don't authenticate against. Most response bodies use `additionalProperties: true` because the docs index page lists endpoints but not response schemas; per-endpoint reference pages would tighten these. Coin price endpoints (current/historical/percentage) are typed via CoinPriceMap; protocol/chain/TVL responses have minimal shapes inferred from the existing hand-written client. Multi-host (4 base URLs) handled via per-operation `servers:` overrides.
